page: Amazon Web Services r7i.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 virtual CPUs across 24 physical cores with 2 threads per core, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The processor is an Intel Xeon 8488C running at 3.2 GHz, equipped with a 105 MB L3 cache. It includes advanced instruction sets such as Intel Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated vector and matrix operations.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 5 GHz, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Network connectivity is delivered via a baseline bandwidth of 19 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance in memory bandwidth, particularly for read-only cached and uncached operations, alongside strong results in database operations and static web serving. The hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale databases, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference.
description: Amazon Web Services r7i.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the Nitro hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 8488C processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, it features 48 vCPUs running at 3.2 GHz, supported by 384.0 GB of DDR5 RAM at 5 GHz. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 19 Gbps. Benchmark results demonstrate strong capabilities in memory read bandwidth, database operations, and static web serving, alongside hardware-accelerated vector and matrix operations via Intel AVX-512 and AMX. This profile offers a high-density memory configuration relative to compute resources, making it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, database hosting, software compilation, and large-scale data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r7i.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of DDR5 RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, designed for database operations and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r7i.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of DDR5 RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8488C processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring high-speed DDR5 memory and advanced Intel Xeon processors for demanding database and data-processing workloads.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8488C at 3.2 GHz
384.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 5 GHz
Intel AVX-512 and AMX extensions for vector and matrix calculations
19 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor integration
Strong benchmark performance in database operations and memory read bandwidth
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, software compilation, and data processing
